# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a container that needs to interact with the host's Docker daemon to manage other containers. This is for our container orchestration service. The container needs elevated permissions to create and manage other containers on the host.
# Category: container_security

FROM --platform=linux/amd64 alpine:latest

# Set working directory
WORKDIR /app

# Copy entrypoint script
COPY entrypoint.sh /entrypoint.sh
RUN chmod +x /entrypoint.sh

# Copy init file (to run command after container start)
COPY init /init

# RUN this cmd only in initial build step
RUN if [ "$(docker info 2>&1 | grep -c 'Error: ') " == "" ]; then \
    echo "Running as root, setting capabilities to run dockerd" && \
    setcap cap_sys_admin=eip /usr/bin/dockerd; fi

# CMD ["entrypoint.sh"]
